final_prompt: An eye-level photograph from slightly left of center, facing a wall. The wall is painted a soft light blue with a matte finish, appearing darker in the low light. On the right side of the wall is a large multi-pane window with a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes; through the glass, a dark night sky dotted with faint stars is visible. A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window base. On the left side of this windowsill sits a white rectangular ceramic pot, about 20cm tall, containing a green plant with broad oval leaves with pointed tips, softly silhouetted against the dark window. Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window, with one panel on the right side drawn slightly open. The floor is a smooth, light-colored surface, possibly white tiles, dimly visible. In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, lies a single small green leaf. The room is illuminated by soft, cool moonlight filtering through the window, creating pale blue shadows across the floor and wall. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Spatial positions: window on the RIGHT wall, plant pot on the LEFT side of the windowsill, leaf on the floor in the FOREGROUND RIGHT-CENTER, curtains on the RIGHT side of the window. Surface materials: smooth matte walls, glossy white window frame, ceramic pot, fabric curtains, smooth light-colored floor.
prompt_before: An eye-level photograph of a room viewed from slightly left of center, facing a wall with a large multi-pane window on the right side. The wall is painted a soft light blue with a matte finish, now appearing darker in the low light. The window has a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes; through the glass, a dark night sky dotted with faint stars is visible. A shallow white windowsill runs the full width of the window base. On the left side of the windowsill sits a white rectangular ceramic pot, about 20cm tall, with a green plant growing upward — broad oval leaves with pointed tips, now softly silhouetted against the dark window. Sheer white curtains hang from a rod above the window, one panel on the right side drawn slightly open. The floor is a smooth, light-colored surface, possibly white tiles, dimly visible. In the foreground, slightly right of center on the floor, lies a single small green leaf. The room is illuminated by a soft, cool moonlight filtering through the window, creating pale blue shadows across the floor and wall. Photorealistic, sharp focus, natural colors. Perspective: Spatial positions: window on the RIGHT wall, plant pot on the LEFT side of the windowsill, leaf on the floor in the FOREGROUND RIGHT-CENTER, curtains on the RIGHT side of the window. constraints: Is the image taken from an eye-level perspective?
Is the camera positioned slightly left of center when facing the wall?
Is the wall painted a soft light blue with a matte finish?
Does the wall appear darker due to low light?
Is there a large multi-pane window on the right side of the wall?
Does the window have a thin white frame divided into rectangular panes?
Is a dark night sky with faint stars visible through the window?
Is there a shallow white windowsill running the full width of the window base?
Is there a white rectangular ceramic pot on the left side of the windowsill?
Is the plant pot approximately 20cm tall?
Does the pot contain a green plant with broad oval leaves with pointed tips?
Is the plant softly silhouetted against the dark window?
Are there sheer white curtains hanging from a rod above the window?
Is one panel of the curtains on the right side drawn slightly open?
Is the floor a smooth, light-colored surface?
Is the floor dimly visible?
Is there a single small green leaf on the floor in the foreground, slightly right of center?
Is the room illuminated by soft, cool moonlight filtering through the window?
Are there pale blue shadows across the floor and wall?
Is the image photorealistic with sharp focus and natural colors?
